tips.title: Compost your kitchen waste
tips.content: Turn vegetable peels and food scraps into rich compost for your garden.
tips.author: eco@user.com

tips.title: Switch to LED bulbs
tips.content: LED bulbs use 75% less energy and last 25x longer than incandescent bulbs.
tips.author: eco2@user.com

tips.title: Use reusable shopping bags
tips.content: A single reusable bag can replace hundreds of plastic bags over its lifetime.
tips.author: eco3@user.com

tips.title: Fix leaky faucets immediately
tips.content: A dripping tap can waste over 3,000 liters of water per year.
tips.author: eco4@user.com

tips.title: Cycle to work once a week
tips.content: Replacing one car trip per week with cycling cuts your carbon footprint significantly.
tips.author: eco5@user.com

events.title: Community Clean-up Day
events.description: Join our neighborhood clean-up event to make our streets greener.

events.title: Tree Plantation Drive
events.description: Plant 500 trees with fellow eco-warriors this weekend.

events.title: Solar Energy Workshop
events.description: Learn how to set up solar panels for your home.

events.title: Zero Waste Cooking Class
events.description: Cook delicious meals using every part of your vegetables.

challenges.title: Plastic-Free July
challenges.description: Avoid single-use plastic for one full month.

challenges.title: 30-Day Energy Saver
challenges.description: Reduce your household energy consumption by 20%.

challenges.title: Cycle to Work Week
challenges.description: Replace your daily commute with cycling for one week.

challenges.title: Water Conservation Month
challenges.description: Track and reduce your daily water usage by 30%.

challenges.title: Home Composting Challenge
challenges.description: Start composting your kitchen waste at home.

challenges.title: Go Vegan for a Week
challenges.description: Try a plant-based diet for 7 days to reduce your carbon footprint.
